sentences.arabic: حِمَايَةُ الْمَعْلُومَاتِ الشَّخْصِيَّةِ عَلَى الْإِنْتِرْنِتِ أَمْرٌ ضَرُورِيٌّ لِلْجَمِيعِ.
sentences.translation: Zaštita ličnih podataka na internetu je neophodna stvar za sve.
sentences.translationEn: Protecting personal information on the internet is a necessary thing for everyone.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ عَلَيْنَا اسْتِخْدَامُ كَلِمَاتِ مُرُورٍ قَوِيَّةٍ لِحِمَايَةِ حِسَابَاتِنَا.
sentences.translation: Moramo koristiti jake lozinke kako bismo zaštitili naše račune.
sentences.translationEn: We must use strong passwords to protect our accounts.

sentences.arabic: يُسَاعِدُ الْأَمْنُ السِّيبِرَانِيُّ فِي مَنْعِ الِاخْتِرَاقَاتِ الرَّقْمِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Kibernetička sigurnost pomaže u sprečavanju digitalnih upada.
sentences.translationEn: Cybersecurity helps in preventing digital breaches.
